name: Santiago Pork Roast
recipeIngredient: 1 Large Onion, thinly sliced into rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the pork loin in a roasting pan and scatter the onion rings over it. Combine the remaining ingredients (salt, lime or lemon juice, soy sauce, granulated sugar, ginger, and garlic) and stir until the sugar dissolves. Pour this mixture over the meat and cover with plastic wrap. Refrigerate for 12 hours, turning occasionally.
2. Preheat the oven to 325°F
3. Place the meat in the oven and bake, basting frequently, about 3 1/2 hours, or until the meat is thoroughly cooked.
